item.title: Perkins Builder Brothers: Deck Gets a New Look
item.description: The Perkins Builder Brothers give a deck a fresh transformation — craftsmanship and creativity in action. What’s your favorite way to refresh outdoor spaces?

media:content.media:description: The Perkins Builder Brothers give a deck a fresh transformation — craftsmanship and creativity in action. What’s your favorite way to refresh outdoor spaces?

item.title: Weathering Storms and Building Dreams
item.description: Through challenges and setbacks, the builder’s dream pushes forward. What’s the biggest storm you’ve had to weather in your projects?

media:content.media:description: Through challenges and setbacks, the builder’s dream pushes forward. What’s the biggest storm you’ve had to weather in your projects?

item.title: Choosing the Right Hammers for Your Toolkit
item.description: Not all hammers are created equal. This clip breaks down which ones belong in every builder’s kit. Which hammer do you reach for most often?

media:content.media:description: Not all hammers are created equal. This clip breaks down which ones belong in every builder’s kit. Which hammer do you reach for most often?

item.title: Tips & Tricks | Pressure‑Treated Wood
item.description: Working with pressure‑treated wood? Here are the tips and tricks to make it last and perform. What’s your best advice for handling treated lumber?

item.title: Building a Home in the Wilderness, Part One
item.description: Remote, rugged, and rewarding — Part One shows the challenges of building a home deep in the wilderness. What’s the toughest obstacle in off‑grid building?

item.title: One Easy Trick to Stop Cables Tangling EVER Again

item.title: The Shameful Secrets Contractors Won’t Tell You
item.description: Behind the scenes of construction, some secrets aren’t shared. This clip reveals what contractors don’t want you to know. Which hidden shortcut do you think is most common?

item.title: Two Days of Laying Blocks | Basement Build
item.description: Hard work and precision — two full days of block laying bring the basement walls to life. What’s your secret for keeping blockwork perfectly level?

item.title: Building a House: EP 11 — The Exterior Trim!
item.description: Details make the difference. Episode 11 focuses on exterior trim, adding polish and character to the build. What trim style do you think elevates a home’s look the most?
